title: Flag completion in mini completion
goal: Extend the bash/zsh completion scripts so that, after a command name, they also complete that command's option flags (e.g. 'mini done --' offers --bump/--push/--apply); the per-command flag map is derived from commander so it stays in sync. Verifiable via snapshot tests of the generated scripts.

steps.title: Renderer carries per-command flags
steps.detail: Change CompletionSpec to a structured command list ({ name, flags: string[] }); renderCompletion emits flag completion — when the current word starts with '-', complete the flags of the command in position 1 (bash via a case statement, zsh via a case), otherwise complete command names (first word) / files as before. Renderers stay pure and snapshot-friendly.

steps.title: CLI derives flags from commander
steps.detail: In cli.ts build the per-command flag list from each command's options (long and short forms via cmd.options), skip hidden commands, and pass the structured list to completion()/renderCompletion so the flags never drift from the real CLI.

steps.title: Update tests, snapshots, docs
steps.detail: Adapt render.test.ts and completion.test.ts to the new shape and add flag-completion cases (e.g. 'mini done --' offers --bump/--push); update docs/non-interactive/completion.md and the README note to mention flag completion; run typecheck and the full test suite.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 121: Flag completion in mini completion
